_publications._publicationTitle: Proof of Concept for Genome Profiling of the Neurofibroma/Sarcoma Sequence in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: the metastases show a more pronounced presence of amplifications and deletions, suggesting greater genomic instability. In particular, some regions of the genome show extreme alterations
details: Successfully performed CNV calling analysis showing that metastases exhibit more pronounced amplifications and deletions with log2 ratio values of about 3 and -3, indicating greater genomic instability compared to primary tumor
